name: BEN_BILL_PAYMENTS_
description: BEN_BILL_PAYMENTS contains information related to Benefits Billing Payments and Captures each payment made by person with necessary details.

columns.Name: BILL_PAYMENT_ID
columns.Comments: System generated primary key column.

columns.Name: PAYMENT_DATE
columns.Comments: This column indicates the payment instrument submission date like cheque submitted date.

columns.Name: PAYMENT_MODE
columns.Comments: This column indicates the payment mode.

columns.Name: PAYMENT_DOC_NUM
columns.Comments: This column indicates the payment document number.

columns.Name: PAYMENT_TYPE
columns.Comments: This column indicates that payment made is credit or debit.

columns.Name: CURRENCY_CODE
columns.Comments: This column holds currency code.

columns.Name: PAYEE_ORG_NAME
columns.Comments: For future use. This column indicates the payee organization name.

columns.Name: PAYEE_ORG_NUM
columns.Comments: For future use. This column indicates the payee organization number.

columns.Name: PAYEE_ORG_DETAILS
columns.Comments: For future use. This column indicates the payee organization details.

columns.Name: AMT_PAID
columns.Comments: This column indicates the amount paid.

columns.Name: COMMENTS
columns.Comments: This column indicates the comments entered by user.

columns.Name: PERSON_ID
columns.Comments: This column indicates the Foreign Key to PER_ALL_PEOPLE_F.

columns.Name: PAY_SEQ
columns.Comments: For future use. This column indicates the pay sequence which is useful to track while handling multiple payments.

columns.Name: BILL_NUM
columns.Comments: This column indicates the bill number which flows from BBEN_BILL_CHARGES.

columns.Name: PAYMENT_ENTRY_DATE
columns.Comments: This column indicates the payment entry recorded date.

columns.Name: PER_ACCT_NUM
columns.Comments: This column indicates Foreign Key to PER_ALL_PEOPLE_F.

columns.Name: ADJ_AMT
columns.Comments: For future use. This column indicates the adjustment amount.

columns.Name: ADJ_DATE
columns.Comments: For future use. This column indicates the adjustment date.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: BUSINESS_GROUP_ID
columns.Comments: This column indicates the Foreign Key to HR_ORGANIZATION_UNITS.
